comment_text:
Pugsley really grew...AND slimmed down since the old days. Nice to see Gomez being as charming as he always is. Morticia being a sword fighter actually makes sense, given the fact some other iterations depicted her using weaponry.

Typically, I'm used to seeing Grandmama as being short and stumpy; almost near identical to Fester in stature. But THIS iteration makes a bit of sense, when you think about it. Granny's a witch and most witches often are glamorous looking, these days.

Nice to see Lurch and Fester are the same delightful creeps we know and love. Speaking OF love, I hope Wednesday has a more loving relationship with her parents than she did in the animated movies that came out not so long ago

video_title: Wednesday: Season 2 | Sneak Peek: Addams Family | Netflix
comment_text:
i'm SOOOOOOO excited to see more of everyone: ENID, Bianca, Eugene, Pugsley, Mr. & Mrs. Addams, Fester, even background Nevermore students! ... but I am BEYOND EXCITED to see more of Lurch! he's one of the core Addams' & there isn't much on him outside of the original sitcom & then the 3D animated movies (which by the way do a stellar job). also stoked to see this crew's take on Grandmama! it's clearly a unique one but i have confidence it will be good! MOST OF ALL I'M SO EXCITED to see more of Jenna's influence on this show. it's an amazing concept with amazing actors but Jenna truly carried the first season by being stubborn & not letting the writers turn it into Riverdale. & despite that conflict, Wednesday completely blew up, so i'm sure this season is going to be phenomenal now that she's more involved!

(P.S. i'm crossing my fingers that this season will end with a tease for yet another addition to the Addams family... PUBERT!!!!!!)
